issues.description: deploy.md unconditionally says 'See `specs/pluggable-cache.md` for the canonical env var list.' but `specs/pluggable-cache.md` does not exist in the repo. This violates NFR-4 ('Every link added must point at a file that exists'). The spec itself anticipated this: FR-3d says 'Refer to the pluggable-cache spec if it exists; otherwise use the examples above as representative.' The implementation should have dropped the reference since the file doesn't exist.
issues.suggestion: Remove the line 'See `specs/pluggable-cache.md` for the canonical env var list.' or replace with something like 'The examples above cover the most common configurations.'

issues.description: FR-1c specifies 'leave a placeholder: `` tag commented out with ``'. The implementation has only `` as a bare comment, not a commented-out `` element (e.g., ``). Functionally equivalent as a placeholder, but not literally an `` tag inside a comment.
issues.suggestion: Consider changing to `` to match the spec's letter, or leave as-is if the intent is just a comment marker.

issues.description:
The new judge paragraph reuses `class="arch-tagline"` which makes it visually identical to the 'Your agents keep working' line. The spec says 'Add a new

' without specifying a class. Using arch-tagline works but may not be the ideal styling — the judge note is a technical detail, not a tagline. This is cosmetic and the spec doesn't prescribe otherwise.
issues.suggestion: Consider a different or no class to visually differentiate the judge note from the primary tagline, or keep as-is if the visual match is acceptable.
